name: Recepção — cadastrar novo paciente com sucesso

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page at https://iamedcenter.netlify.app/
Enter 'testesprite@gmail.com' in the email input field
Enter 'testesprite123' in the password input field
Click the submit button to log in
Click on the 'Recepção e Admissão' module card (id: 1)
Fill in the patient name field with 'Teste QA'
Fill in the phone number field with '+595981234567'
Fill in the birthdate field with '1990-01-15'
Click the 'Próximo' button 3 times to reach the guardian tab
Click the 'Admitir na Triagem' button to submit the form
The new patient 'Teste QA' appears in the patient list on the right side
